posts.title: My Dress Up Darling Anime Locations! 📍Ikebukuro Station, Katase Higashihama Beach, Chichibu Shrine ℹ️ animepilgrimage What would you rate the show /10? Are you watching Season 2? #animeedit #fyp #anitok #animefyp #viralanime #mydressupdarling

Our third stop should be none other than My Dress up Darling in Ikebukuro! There’s so many locations in such a close proximity that you should definitely try and see them all! 📍Location 1 - Sunshine City rooftop Here we find Marin attending her first cosplay event in person as the lovely Shizuku! 📍Location 2 - park outside Animate Ikebukuro We find Marin and Gojo enjoying an afternoon stroll after school time.  📍Location 3 - Animate Ikebukuro Taken from the opening of Season 1, Marin and Gojo are enjoying Animate together!  Where do you want to see us next???  Make sure to also follow us on Instagram and TikTok to stay up to date with our latest adventures @MyAnimePassport.EN  #mydressupdarling  #その着せ替え人形は恋をする#そnonimePilgrimage #AnimeInRealLife #JapanTrip

My Dress-up Darling Anime Locations! ✨ 📍Locations: Yuzawa Ikebukuro, Ikebukuro Station, Underpass near I•O•M Ikebukuro  American anime fans, what are your Marin thoughts? 💭  #animefyp #animetiktok #animeirl #marin #mydressupdarling

My Dress up Darling (その着せ替え人形は恋をする ) is most likely the most famous anime set in Ikebukuro currently and one well worth travelling to see! In season 2 they doubled down on Sunshine city and all the events that happen around the rooftop area and surrounding cosplay themed stores! 📍Location - Sunshine City, Ikebukuro Where do you want to see the next live action anime adaptation? Make sure to leave a comment on where we should go next! Our sixth stop should be none other than My Dress up Darling in Ikebukuro! There’s so many locations in such a close proximity that you should definitely try and see them all! 📍Location 1 - Ikebukuro station east exit Here we find Marin bidding farewell to Gojo after spending the day shopping together 📍Location 2 - 1 Chome 16 Minami Ikebukuro We find Marin and Gojo enjoying an evening walk as Marin prepares to open up to Gojo.
